title: mongodb-operator values
description: Dependency-wrapper for the upstream MongoDB community-operator chart (aliased to `operator`). Values pass through under `operator`.

global.title: Global values
global.description: Helm global values propagated to the upstream subchart.

operator.title: Upstream community-operator passthrough
operator.description: Values forwarded to the upstream MongoDB community-operator subchart (operator deployment, RBAC, community-operator-crds, createResource, etc.).
